blurb: HomeKit secures smart home device communication using the Home Accessory Protocol with Ed25519 signatures and Curve25519 ECDH for pairing and session key establishment. The Matter smart home standard uses SPAKE2+ for device commissioning, with ongoing communication secured by AES-128-CCM. Home configuration and automation data is stored in CloudKit using end-to-end encryption, accessible only to the user's enrolled devices. Remote access passes through Apple's infrastructure as ciphertext Apple cannot decrypt. Shared home access uses per-user cryptographic identities, and guest access is scoped to specific accessories via cryptographically bound access-controlled invitations.
